examples.title: Machine Learning Engineer - College Graduate
examples.description: Develop machine learning models and optimize inference for edge AI products. Preferred qualifications include knowledge of NPUs, machine-learning accelerators, quantized inference, and hardware-aware performance optimization. Use Python, C++, and PyTorch for deployment on constrained devices.

examples.title: Embedded AI Engineer
examples.description: Build on-device inference pipelines for edge AI systems with INT8 quantization, C++ deployment, latency profiling, and constrained embedded hardware.

examples.title: ML Compiler Engineer
examples.description: Implement compiler and runtime code generation for quantized PyTorch models, tensor layout optimization, C++ kernels, and inference performance benchmarking.

examples.title: Verification Infrastructure Engineer
examples.description: Build Python infrastructure for UVM regression triage, scoreboards, functional coverage, assertions, and waveform debugging.

examples.title: Machine Learning Engineer
examples.description: Train PyTorch models, evaluate experiments, analyze datasets, run model comparison, and communicate results with product teams.

examples.title: RTL Design Engineer
examples.description: Implement SystemVerilog RTL, microarchitecture, synthesis, timing closure, PPA analysis, and SoC cache-coherence datapaths.
